---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new automation or integration for SyllabSync
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g., "I keep missing my study sessions because I don't check my email, I need a WhatsApp alert.")

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of the new node or integration you want to see (e.g., adding a Twilio or Telegram node).

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Any other ways this could be solved within n8n.

**Proposed Workflow Change**
If you have an idea of where this should fit in the current `Setup -> Groq -> Merge` logic, please describe it here.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or mock-up screenshots of how the new email or calendar event should look.
